title: clerodendrum triphyllum var. ciliatum
intro: Clerodendrum triphyllum var. ciliatum, also known as the Florida glory bower or yellow glory bower, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its clusters of small, yellow flowers and distinctive foliage. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum triphyllum var. ciliatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
